Find Your CX Expert

Quickly connect with the right Customer Experience expert across CenTrak.

Use this page to identify team members based on their product expertise in hardware, software, tools, or training experience. Whether you need guidance on deployment, support processes, healthcare workflows, or education content, this directory helps you locate the right person faster.

How to use this page
  • Browse by skill on the left. Search for products under the Hardware or Software sections, explore Tools for internal CX systems, or review Server & Maintenance and Training categories to find experts associated with specific topics or technologies.
  • Switch to the "People" tab to search for a specific team member and view their full skill profile.
  • Select a skill category to see the CX experts who support that area.

This resource is designed to help teams across Sales, Product, Engineering, Support, and Operations quickly find the right CX contact when questions arise.
